Summary

Software Developer with 2+ years of experience designing, developing, and deploying scalable applications across e-commerce, CRM, appointment booking, and AI-driven business automation domains. Proven expertise in building production-grade full-stack systems using Python, Django, FastAPI, Node.js, React.js, Next.js, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, Docker, and cloud technologies. Hands-on experience architecting and deploying enterprise GenAI applications leveraging LLMs, LangChain, LangGraph, RAG, MCP, Azure OpenAI, and Agentic AI workflows.
